stages.name: Foundations
stages.description: Core infrastructure — data warehouse, ETL pipelines, BI tool, and a clean dbt modeling layer.

stages.name: Data Validation
stages.description: Data quality gates — PK uniqueness, revenue integrity, freshness checks, CI/CD triggers, and full documentation.

stages.name: Project Management
stages.description: Team workflows — unified Slack channels, GitHub PR notifications, and Linear × GitHub integration.

stages.name: AI Readiness
stages.description: Claude integrated across the data stack — Snowflake MCP, team licenses, marketing skills, and project prompts.

stages.name: Basic Visibility
stages.description: All spend sources consolidated. Baseline platform metrics in one place.

stages.name: Basic Attribution
stages.description: UTM hygiene, web events, and first attribution models — last-click, first-click, and blended CAC.

stages.name: Budget Tracking
stages.description: Link spend to outcomes. Data-driven CAC targets, live pacing dashboards, and scenario modeling.

stages.name: Channel Specific
stages.description: Deep attribution by channel type — partnerships, creative performance, landing pages, and product.

stages.name: Enhanced Attribution
stages.description: Promo codes, post-purchase surveys, identity resolution, and LTV-weighted attribution models.

stages.name: Signal Engineering
stages.description: Server-side events, CAPI, enhanced conversions, customer list syncs, and LTV-weighted bidding.

stages.name: Channel Testing
stages.description: Holdout methodology, incrementality tests, and geo experiments to measure true lift per channel.

stages.name: Mix Modeling
stages.description: Bayesian MMM with adstock, diminishing returns curves, and data-driven budget reallocation.

stages.name: Self-Optimizing
stages.description: Triangulated attribution and a self-optimizing feedback loop across all models.

stages.name: Revenue Visibility
stages.description: Gross and net revenue trending by product, SKU, and plan — with period-over-period views and a daily dashboard.

stages.name: Targets & Planning
stages.description: Annual and quarterly targets set by channel and day, aligned with the marketing budget plan.

stages.name: Pacing & Actuals
stages.description: Live revenue and marketing spend pacing vs. targets — refreshed daily with over/under flags.

stages.name: Business Reviews
stages.description: Automated WBR, MBR, and an always-on business health panel for leadership.

stages.name: Forecasting
stages.description: Dynamic forward projections blending trends, cohort curves, spend, and billing schedules.

stages.name: Cost Foundation
stages.description: Fully landed COGS, fulfillment costs, returns tracking, and contribution margin at SKU level.
milestones: Fully landed COGS by product & SKU

stages.name: Unit Economics
stages.description: Profitability trending, discount depth analysis, and margin impact by campaign and segment.

stages.name: P&L
stages.description: Full P&L dashboard from revenue to EBITDA, actuals vs. targets, and subscriber-level P&L.

stages.name: CAC & Payback
stages.description: Fully-loaded CAC, payback period by channel, and LTV:CAC ratios by cohort.

stages.name: Merchandise Performance
stages.description: SKU-level basket mix, merchandise dashboard, NPS by product, return reasons, reorder rate, and health score.
milestones: Returns reason & CS ticket volume by product

stages.name: Fulfillment Visibility
stages.description: Order volume, fulfillment cost, shipping zones, carrier performance, and a daily ops dashboard.
milestones: Orders shipped by day, week & month

stages.name: Inventory Visibility
stages.description: SKU-level on-hand counts, weeks on hand, availability %, inventory value, low-stock alerts, and dead stock flags.

stages.name: OTIF & Quality
stages.description: On-time, in-full delivery rate broken down by carrier, SKU, damage, lost-in-transit, order accuracy, and customer-reported issues.

stages.name: Returns & Reverse Logistics
stages.description: Return volume, return rate by SKU, restockable vs. write-off splits, net inventory impact, and quality complaint tracking.
milestones: Return volume by SKU, region & reason

stages.name: Vendor & Supplier Performance
stages.description: Supplier on-time delivery, fill rate, lead time variance, cost variance, quality rejection, concentration risk, and supplier scorecard.

stages.name: Inventory Planning
stages.description: Consumption rates, reorder points, safety stock models, EOQ optimization, inventory health dashboard, and ops input to WBR/MBR.

stages.name: Baseline Visibility
stages.description: Core subscription health — growth, churn, modifications, and structured cancellation reason tracking.

stages.name: Cohort Foundation
stages.description: Retention and LTV curves by cohort, channel, plan, and seasonality — built on daily data models.
milestones: CAC:LTV and payback period by channel

stages.name: Customer Segmentation
stages.description: Lifecycle stages, CRM engagement tiers, LRFM scoring, and high-LTV segment identification.

stages.name: CRM & Lifecycle Activation
stages.description: Automated flows, win-back programs, cancellation intervention, NPS, and voice of customer.

stages.name: Predictive Retention
stages.description: ML churn scoring, reactivation propensity, upgrade propensity, and LTV prediction models.

stages.name: Personalization & Growth
stages.description: Product recommendations, data-derived personas, subscriber P&L, and loyalty program analytics.
